Document:
# Proto-Feline
Much like the Protogen-Cyclopses, they also took on a name that distances themselves from their own race- coming up with the distinction all on their own. It's not very.. Creative.
## Changes from the "Protogen" base species. Values listed replace "Protogen" values of that damage catagory, they do not stack ontop of them.
- Rapidly deal [color=red]3[/color] slashing damage with your short claws.
